ddls:
CREATE TABLE "offense_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense category */,
  "major_category" TEXT /* Major category of the offense */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the offense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each offense category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the demographic group (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the demographic group (e.g., Black, White, Hispanic, Other) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the demographic group (e.g., 18-24, 25-34, 35-44) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the demographic group (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistic entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offense category */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of offenses for the demographic group */,
  "percent" TEXT /* Percentage of offenses for the demographic group */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the offense (e.g., Increasing, Decreasing, Stable) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crime statistic */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the crime statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES offense_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data availability entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offense category */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group */,
  "data_available" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if data is available for the demographic group */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Police Department, FBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_availability_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES offense_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_availability_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, officer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Police, FBI, Research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime statistic entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used to access the data (e.g., filters, sorting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES crime_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, annual, ad-hoc) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES crime_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES crime_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., owner, editor, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES crime_statistics ("stat_id")
)
